title: Robert Badeer
compiled_truth: Robert Badeer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-10 to 2002-05-22), Robert Badeer sent 89 and received 1332 emails, totalling 1421 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tim Belden](people/tim-belden) (11), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (5), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (4), [David Parquet](people/david-parquet) (4), [Matt Motley](people/matt-motley) (4). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, contacts, inbox, outbox, sent_items.
